## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to align on content topics and prioritization for Superhuman's SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on AI and automation as primary content themes, with team collaboration as secondary](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
  - [Prioritize high-volume, low-difficulty keywords relevant to Superhuman's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Leverage Superhuman's unique features (e.g., snippets, integrations) in content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Expand into professional services market and address competitor comparisons (e.g., Notion Mail)](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Priorities

  - [AI and automation to be the main focus (70% of content)](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Team collaboration as a secondary theme](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Productivity tools and email management as foundational topics](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Experiment with various topics to gauge traction and refine strategy](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)

### Keyword Prioritization Approach

  - [Consider three factors: keyword difficulty, search volume, and relevance to Superhuman](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Balance high-volume, competitive keywords with niche, future-focused topics](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Manually review and rate topic relevance to ensure alignment with brand direction](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)

### AI-Focused Content Opportunities

  - [Expand beyond the current 50 AI-related topics identified](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Explore AI use cases for email-related challenges](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [Position Superhuman as a leader in AI email solutions](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Act quickly on AI content (next 18 months) before it becomes mainstream](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)

### Feature-Specific Content

  - [Highlight unique Superhuman features like snippets and templates](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [Create content around integrations (e.g., Grammarly, HubSpot, Salesforce)](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Focus on use cases enabled by integrations rather than broad integration topics](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Address comparisons with key competitors: Notion Mail, Spark, Shortwave](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)
  - [Develop competitor landing pages for Google, Outlook, Spark, Shortwave, and Notion](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
  - [Utilize the Notion Mail comparison document for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Team to review and approve topics in Airtable (mark as "Ready to start")](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide 1-2 calibration articles for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
  - [Iterate on content quality based on Superhuman team's input](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Superhuman team to review AI automation topics in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [GrowthX to send 1-2 calibration articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)
  - [Superhuman to provide access to GA4, Search Console, and other relevant tools](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
  - [GrowthX to summarize additional information needs in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
  - [Introduce Morgan (new Demand Gen leader) to the project next week](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)
  - [Continue refining content strategy based on feedback and performance data](https://fathom.video/share/-CxeYvoPSockaXTYoQBir7TEX6sN14Ay?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
